title: Display of license
doc_html:
§304.4.  Display of license

Unless specifically provided for elsewhere, vessel licenses and license numbers shall be displayed in accordance with rules and regulations of the department.  

Acts 1986, No. 904, §1.  

{{NOTE:  SEE ACTS 1986, NO. 904, §5.}}
